settings.title: Settings
settings.force_gpu: Force use of discrete graphics card
versions.title: Version Manager
versions.subtitle: Manage Minecraft versions and create new instances
versions.err_exists: An instance with that name already exists
instance.select_hint: Select an instance to view console output
instance.no_screenshots: No screenshots found in the instance folder.
instance.confirm_delete_content: Are you sure you want to delete this instance? This action cannot be undone.
wizard.welcome.title: Welcome to CubicLauncher!
wizard.welcome.body: We will guide you through a quick setup to personalize your experience. It will only take a moment.
wizard.welcome.hint: Use the navigation buttons below to advance or go back between steps.
wizard.language.title: Select your language
wizard.language.body: Choose the language you want to use in the launcher.
wizard.style.title: Interface style
wizard.style.body: Choose how you want CubicLauncher to look.
wizard.style.warning: ⚠ The native style may have visual glitches. We recommend CubicDark.
wizard.java.title: Configure Java
wizard.java.body: CubicLauncher needs Java to launch Minecraft. You can auto-detect it now or configure it later in Settings.
wizard.java.skip_hint: You can also configure Java manually from Settings → Java.
wizard.java.status.idle: Java has not been detected yet. Click the button to search.
wizard.java.status.not_found: No Java installation found. Install Java 8, 17, or 21 and configure it in Settings.
wizard.license.title: Open source & licenses
wizard.license.body: CubicLauncher is free and open-source software. By using it you accept the terms of the following license:
wizard.license.description: You may use, modify, and distribute this software under the terms of the AGPL-3.0. Modifications must also be open source.
wizard.license.enjoy: All set! Click «Let's go!» and enjoy Minecraft.
